title: OreUI Reimagined
description: A different spin on Minecraft's UI inspired by OreUI
body:
![inventory preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Rf3QBf0I/images/b7f99e55a29ba477588bcf216617f6b1708df584.png)
# OreUI Reimagined
## About
OreUI Reimagined is a resource pack that updates game's UI to match the new modern UI system used by Mojang on their websites and in Bedrock game. 

> **This project is still in development, so there are some things that are missing, drafts, or simply not tweeked to perfection.**

## OptiGUI Features
[![OptiGUI recommended](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2abacdd98a6996ed84a854d2730eda2afd51e8de.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)
### Colorful Shulker Boxes
![oreui reimagined colorful shulker box](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8cba86d2ef12a3aef3637ca61c33b0a91afa593.gif)

## Mod Support

**_The resourcepack also supports following mods:_**
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback)
- [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)

**_Upcoming support for mods:_**
- [Armor Poser](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-poser)

## Player feedback
Player feedback is always welcomed! If you spot any mistakes, have any suggestions or ideas to improve the RP, feel free to contact me! Currently the only way to leave any feedback or contact me directly is via Planet Minecraft. Use one of the links below if you want to submit feedback.

Additionally feel free to suggest mods that you'd like to see supported by the mod. I personally play with vanilla-friendly mods (like the ones listed above) so that's why I made the support for those.

[![world minecraft project page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f8d9d28537ec9d092839b88801154d37e302477.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/oreui-reimagined/)     [![world minecraft my page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abfeb5510f0b1844d44e3e5f9909d15166f45ba5.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/mixeldapixel/)
